value: A single cell approach to map cellular subsets involved in Systemic Lupus Erythematosus (SLE) heterogeneity

In this study, we analyzed the transcriptomes of ~276k single PBMCs from 33 childhood SLE (cSLE) and 11 healthy matched donors (cHD). Our findings were validated in an independent cohort including 8 adult SLE (aSLE) patients and 6 matched controls (aHD; ~132k PBMCs).

cSLE dataset included 33 cSLE (cSLE1 to cSLE33). 11 cHD controles (cHD1 to cHD11) aSLE dataset included 8 aSLE (aSLE1 to aSLE8) and 6 aHD controles (aHD1 to aHD6). Clinical information to be found in supplementary table 1.
**The raw data have been deposited in dbGaP (Study accession: phs002048.v1.p1) due to patient privacy concerns.**
Expression profiling by high throughput sequencing
